# hetzner_ip_cancellation (Resource)

Manages cancellation for a Hetzner IP address. Creating this resource cancels the IP; destroying it withdraws the cancellation.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cancellation_date` (String) Cancellation date in yyyy-MM-dd format, or "now" for immediate cancellation.
- `ip` (String) The IP address to cancel.

### Read-Only

- `cancelled` (Boolean) Whether the IP is cancelled.
- `earliest_cancellation_date` (String) Earliest possible cancellation date.
- `server_number` (String) The server number the IP is assigned to.
